intended_use: Commercially reusable, paraphrased academic-accuracy fixtures for the frozen Topic4 C3 academic verifier.

verification_notes: Crossref metadata and publisher-hosted PDFs were checked on 2026-07-21 UTC.
The source PDFs are not committed to the repository; hashes permit later byte-level verification.
Only individual chapter rights are relied upon. The reserved-rights book compilations are not redistributed.
All dataset claims are original concise paraphrases; no figures, tables, or substantial source passages are reproduced.
